deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Estate sale completed. Lien resolved via notary Apr 21. Funded Apr 26, closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Thank you to Chelsey Bongiovi. Joy gift delivery pending.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded
Cleared and funded
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer (Michael Rodriguez) stalled - no earnest money. Property clearing complete. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve once clearing wraps. Next qualified offer target.

logs.m: Amendment signed, MLS updated to $117,500. Commission box correction needed.
Clearing complete. Photos sent to social media. First offer dead.
Current offer stalled. Michael Rodriguez financing not moving.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Cleanup in progress - floor demo done, drywall ready. Utilities coordinated. Listing agreement needed to Priority Bank. Work started May 9.
deals.next: Get transformer number tomorrow, submit electric application. Finalize listing agreement for Jerry/Ray.

logs.m: Cleanup active, floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utility providers confirmed.
On-site visit, dumpsters running. Bryce and wife (VA buyer) identified.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by ~$93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Vacant 6 months. Double-carrying mortgage plus Pearl area rent. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.
deals.next: Broker call first. Then present three options to Matt and Chandler.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent. Option 3 highlighted: strategic drop to $518,999.
Express Offers returned $550K - likely inflated given market reality.
Market analysis complete. Realistic value $350K-$400K. Underwater confirmed.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referred by Isaac Linares. 3BR/2.5BA. Listed May 14 at $259,900. June deadline. First showing received - cultural concerns (Filipino buyer). Roof claim in progress with insurance adjuster.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Roof/fascia decision pending insurance.

logs.m: MLS live. First showing feedback received. Cultural concern flagged. Roof claim moving forward.
Listing agreement signed. Photos received from ATG Photography.
Listing consultation on-site. Seller packet delivered. $259,900 recommended.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage. Sisters want to end listing. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer, contingent on project). Title defect identified and being corrected by attorney Van Hutchins.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement co-signer info. Confirm extension with sisters. Connect Isaac and Josh LT.

logs.m: Isaac development angle: 10-acre mobile home lots. Josh LT potential partner - connect them.
Title defect found - deed missing exhibits. Attorney preparing correction deed.
Isaac development interest discussed. Sisters enthusiastic about mobile home angle.

deals.title: Moran - New Construction Buyer
deals.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1000/month payment. Rental property at 8527 Green Bliss (Grace Gardens, Lennar) being coordinated. New home search platform sent to browse builders.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach Schaphorst. Identify new construction builders - no HOA.

logs.m: MI Homes option from Frank in play. Follow up on Milagros timeline through Brandon.
Intro email sent to Milagros and team. New construction search platform activated.
Buyer rep agreement signed. Rate buydown strategy communicated.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Rental
deals.notes: Grace Gardens Lennar home. Jimbo's rental for 2 years before owner-occupancy. 1535 sqft, 3BR/2BA, new construction 2025. Rent $1595/month (12-month lease, no pets). All rental terms confirmed. Listing agreement finalization in progress.
deals.next: Finalize and send Skyslope listing agreement. Coordinate vinyl signs. Prepare property photos.

logs.m: Jimbo replied to all questions same day. All rental terms confirmed. Listing agreement ready for Skyslope.
CMA completed - $1595/month recommended. Matches direct comp at 8523 Green Bliss.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers. Ready to move forward.

deals.title: Colton & Abby Brown - 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Prior VA loan clients. 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Market value $275K-$315K. Net to sellers ranges -$4.3K to +$47.7K depending on list price. Thin market (3 comps only).
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage. Discuss contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751.

logs.m: Met on-site ~10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled, net sheet built.
Colton looking for contractor work. Potential tie to 181 CR 7751 project.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv - Investor Analysis
deals.notes: Off-market flip for branded property analysis template. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1. Building That Gardening Realtor analysis tool.
deals.next: Chris pull MLS comps and RPR. Build analysis sheet template. Use for second deal.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used to build property analysis tool framework.

deals.title: Kurt - 9815 Conbes
deals.notes: Neighbor around the corner from 9815 Conbes. Wants intel on nearby listing under contract at $275K. Possible seller or buyer lead.
deals.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up on listing timeline and opportunity.

logs.m: Moving forward - pull CMA and determine if Kurt is seller, buyer, or investor lead.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell - Buyer
deals.notes: Rental property being sold. Landlord renovating, rents increasing. Pivoted to new construction strategy - rate buydowns and no HOA requirement. Pre-approval expected Feb 2026 with Zach Schaphorst.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Set up new construction home search platform.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com search platform. Hopefully they engage while pre-approval sorts.
Rental property being sold. 916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, pass. Pivoting to new construction.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing through plants story. Needs permission for content collaboration. Potential real estate long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story. Keep nurturing.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Met in person. Buy box unknown. Likely Schertz area. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake - understand buy box, budget, timeline, flip vs hold.

leads.title: Christina Shine - 13810 Tangle Tree St
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Plans to sell soon. Working with realtor now. Property ~90% complete, trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote to network. Keep relational.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son (Inherited Property)
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor may have passed. Son now owns house behind her. Deceased was avid gardener. Son not yet contacted.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out as neighbor first.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 worksite May 11. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military. Recently moved from Ohio, renting, looking to buy San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Confirm wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Buyer with Fixer
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner (downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo area). Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full details - buyer profile, property type, price range.

leads.title: Brandon Moran - Investor/Connections
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Chris helped Brandon get started in real estate. Managing Green Bliss rental and mother Milagros new construction buyer opportunity. Property manager referral channel.
leads.next: Send PM company options to Brandon. Confirm exact addresses and timeline. Register Milagros as buyer agent.

leads.title: Priority Bank - REO Referral Pipeline
leads.detail: Jerry Sadler (Special Projects) and Ray Stidham (decision-maker). Chris is listing agent for Priority Bank REO properties. Referral income from other agents network. Houston agent Manny Fonseca already working deal. Tennessee agent group also referred.
leads.next: Send 181 CR 7751 listing agreement to Jerry/Ray. Keep Manny in loop. Monitor referral pipeline.

priorities.title: 340 Sollock Dr - Broker Call & Path Decision
priorities.notes: Talk to broker about short sale protocol, subbing out Devine listing, investor introduction guidelines. Then present three paths to Matt and Chandler: Path A (short sale), Path B (VA assumption), Path C (bring cash).

Schedule call with Matt Gamez and Chandler Grulli
Present three options and get seller preference

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 - Listing Agreement to Priority Bank

Prepare listing agreement for Priority Bank
Send to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham
